zh.Hintlesham, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可辛特萊善姆
zh.Of Hintlesham,, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可辛特萊善姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Vessey於1557年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可辛特萊善姆時，他的父親William Vesey30歲，母親Joan Cutler34歲。他於1507年與Elizabeth Reynold在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1616年7月15日在愛爾蘭享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Vessey于1557年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可辛特萊善姆时，他的父亲William Vesey30岁，母亲Joan Cutler34岁。他于1507年与Elizabeth Reynold在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1616年7月15日在爱尔兰享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vessey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vessey (Manche), named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Vessius or Vettius (of uncertain origin) + the locative suffix -acum. There has been some confusion with Veazey .

variants.name: Veazey
meanings: English (Rutland): nickname from Anglo-Norman French enveisé ‘playful’ (Old French envoisié), Latinized as invesiatus (compare medieval Latin invasus ‘possessed by a demon’) and paralleled by lascivus ‘wanton’. The first syllable was lost early, resulting in numerous dialectal and orthographic variants; only Lenfestey preserves the fuller form, with an intrusive medial -t-. There has also been some confusion with Vessey .
History: John Veazey came from England to MD in the late 17th century. Thomas Ward Veazey (born 1774) was a MD legislator and planter.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: Accession of James I. Surrender of Hugh O'Neill. Enforcement of English Law in Ireland.

en.lifeSummary: When William Vessey was born in 1557, in Hintlesham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Vesey, was 30 and his mother, Joan Cutler, was 34. He married Elizabeth Reynold in 1507, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 15 July 1616, in Ireland, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Vessey est né en 1557, à Hintlesham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Vesey, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan Cutler, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Reynold en 1507, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1616, à Irlande, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Vessey 1557 in Hintlesham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Vesey 30 und seine Mutter Joan Cutler 34. Er hat 1507 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Reynold geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juli 1616 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Vessey è nato il nel 1557 nel Hintlesham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Vesey, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Joan Cutler, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Reynold nel 1507, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 15 luglio 1616, nel Irlanda, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Vesseyが1557年にイギリスイギリススフォルクヒントレシャムで生まれた時，父William Veseyは30歳，母Joan Cutlerは34歳であった。1507年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでElizabeth Reynoldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1616年7月15日にアイルランドで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Vessey(이)가 1557년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 인틀레샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Vesey(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Cutler(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Elizabeth Reynold(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1616년 7월 15일 아일랜드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Vessey nasceu em 1557, em Hintlesham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Vesey, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan Cutler, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Reynold em 1507, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de julho de 1616, em Irlanda, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Vessey родился в 1557 г. в местности хинтлешам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Vesey было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Cutler, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Reynold в 1507 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 15 июля 1616 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Vessey nació en 1557, en Hintlesham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Vesey, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan Cutler, tenía 34 años.
